item.title:
Introducing the Binance Alpha Page.
Learn how Alpha Points work. See real historical returns from A...
item.description:
Introducing the Binance Alpha Page.
Learn how Alpha Points work. See real historical returns from Alpha events. Track how many Alpha tokens have progressed to Binance listing.
Your home for all things Alpha.
Start exploring 👉 https://t.co/icqFsRgXGT https://t.co/twmUQKAxxq
--- @binance | ❤️ 17 | 🔁 4 | 💬 7 | 👁 1017

item.title:
.@GoogleCloud and NVIDIA are expanding their partnership across agentic and physical AI.
At #Googl...
item.description:
.@GoogleCloud and NVIDIA are expanding their partnership across agentic and physical AI.
At #GoogleCloudNext, the companies made several announcements, including:
✅ NVIDIA Vera Rubin-powered A5X instances, scaling up to nearly 1M Rubin GPUs ✅ Gemini on Google Distributed Cloud, powered by the NVIDIA Blackwell platform ✅ First Confidential Computing NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs in the cloud ✅ Agentic AI built on Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform with NVIDIA Nemotron and NeMo
--- @nvidia | ❤️ 35 | 🔁 4 | 💬 4 | 👁 2491
item.author: @nvidia

item.author: @levelsio

item.title: It completely fell off the Earth.
item.author: @tunguz

item.title:
Common reasons to use a session store:
Multi-host deployments. Serverless functions, autoscaled wor...
item.description:
Common reasons to use a session store:
Multi-host deployments. Serverless functions, autoscaled workers, and CI runners don’t share a filesystem. A shared store lets any replica resume any session.
Durability. Local containers are ephemeral. A store backed by S3 or a database survives restarts and redeploys.
Compliance and audit. Keep transcripts in storage you already govern, with your own retention rules, encryption, and access controls.
--- @noahzweben | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 358
item.author: @noahzweben

item.title: Session store adapters in Agent SDK are now live! We published example adapters in TS and Python for...
item.description:
Session store adapters in Agent SDK are now live! We published example adapters in TS and Python for S3, Redis, and Postgres adapter shapes.
You can now mirror transcripts to your own backend, so a session created on one host can be resumed on another.
https://t.co/Tsig9T9hsd
--- @noahzweben | ❤️ 16 | 🔁 0 | 💬 3 | 👁 704
item.author: @noahzweben

item.title: 🏩 Added amenities to https://t.co/kSbsCmuvBO now, they're detected based on an AI checking all photo...
item.description:
🏩 Added amenities to https://t.co/kSbsCmuvBO now, they're detected based on an AI checking all photos of a hotel, so there's no need for outdated data sets
It also means I can add any amenity that'd show up on a photo as long as it can be recognized
So I'm adding 🏋️‍♀️weightlifting gym filter, so you can find hotels with actual barbell, plates, power rack and not just a treadmill and 5kg dumbbells!
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 27 | 🔁 0 | 💬 8 | 👁 7409
item.author: @levelsio
